session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's the summary:
## Changes Made
**`src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/download_remote_session.py`**: - Replaced direct `subprocess.run(["git", "show", ...])` call with `git.commit.read_file_from_ref()` gateway method - Removed unused `import subprocess`
**`tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_download_remote_session.py`**: - Updated error test docstring/comments to reflect gateway-based behavior (returns `None` for unconfigured refs instead of subprocess failure) - Added new `test_success_downloads_session_from_branch` test using `FakeGit` with `ref_file_contents` to verify the happy path
## Verification
- All 7 unit tests pass - All 981 broader exec script tests pass - Type checker clean - Ruff lint clean - No remaining `subprocess` usage in the file
**PR**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8579
